hero.title: Your community, your market
hero.subtitle: Connect with local entrepreneurs, publish your products, and participate in an economy that puts people first.
howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to join the movement
values.title: Our principles
values.subtitle: Tsuru is built on values that put people and community first
features.page.title: Everything you need to sell with purpose
features.page.subtitle: Simple, powerful tools designed for entrepreneurs who value community over complexity.
features.cta.title: Start building your space today
features.cta.subtitle: Join thousands of entrepreneurs already selling with purpose.
fairs.title: Ferias: where community gathers
fairs.subtitle: Virtual and local fairs that bring buyers and sellers together in a shared space.
fairs.what.title: What are Tsuru fairs?
fairs.what.description: Fairs are organized events — virtual or in-person — where multiple sellers come together in one shared space. Buyers can discover many local producers at once, and sellers gain visibility as part of a community.
fairs.cta.title: Ready to show your products at a fair?
fairs.cta.subtitle: Create your store and join the next fair in your community.
community.title: More than a store — a community
community.subtitle: Tsuru connects people who want to trade locally, support each other, and build a fairer economy together.
community.barter.title: Barter & exchange
community.barter.description: Our barter system lets community members exchange products or services without money. Skills, time, goods — all have value.
community.mutual.title: Mutual support networks
community.mutual.description: Connect with entrepreneurs who share your values. Find collaborators, mentors, and customers who believe in local commerce.
community.cta.title: Become part of the community
community.cta.subtitle: Create your store for free and connect with people who share your values.
about.title: Born from community, built for community
about.subtitle: Tsuru was born in Guápiles, Costa Rica, from a university community project during the pandemic to reconnect isolated communities through their local fairs and barter networks.
about.queEs.title: Not just a store — a movement
about.queEs.description: Tsuru is a platform born from the TCU "Comer Orgánico" at the Universidad de Costa Rica, in partnership with the Feria del Trueque Verde Manantial in Guápiles. It lets entrepreneurs, local businesses, and communities create their own space online, publish products, sell (mainly via WhatsApp), and participate in fairs and barter — just like before the pandemic, but now with the reach of the internet.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To give communities the digital tools to stay connected, trade fairly, and keep their local fair and barter traditions alive — no matter what the world throws at them.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.team.title: A project rooted in community
about.team.description: Tsuru started as a university community project and grew into a platform used by real people. We are researchers, builders, and community advocates who believe that technology should serve people — not the other way around.
examples.title: Choose your style, create your space
examples.subtitle: Explore stores created with Tsuru templates. Each one has a unique design ready to customize.
examples.cta.title: Ready to create your own space?
examples.cta.subtitle: Start free, choose your template, and begin connecting with your community today.
footer.description: Social Solidarity Economy platform for entrepreneurs, local businesses, and organized communities.
auth.register.passwordStrength.label: Password Strength
blog.title: Latest news and updates
blog.subtitle: Tips, guides, and insights for growing your online business
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.form.name: Full Name
contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.responseTimeDesc: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. Thank you for your patience!
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our community platform
terms.acceptanceNotice: By using Tsuru, you commit to participating in the community with respect, honesty, and solidarity. This platform was built to reconnect communities — we ask every user to honor that spirit in every interaction.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information
privacy.noticeDesc: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our platform. If you have any questions about how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about how we use cookies
cookies.explanation: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember information about your visit, such as your preferences and activity. Cookies can be essential for basic website functionality or used to enhance user experience through tracking and personalization.
cookies.browser: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can choose to accept all cookies, reject all cookies, or be notified when a cookie is being set.
cookies.importantDesc: Disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of our platform. We recommend keeping essential cookies enabled to ensure the best experience. Non-essential cookies can be disabled without affecting core functionality.

admin.rbac.gate.title: Platform sign-in
admin.rbac.gate.subtitle: Sign in with a platform administrator account to manage RBAC.
admin.rbac.gate.openMode: Open mode: admin authentication is disabled until the dedicated admin Cognito pool ships (ADMIN_AUTH_MODE=open).
admin.rbac.gate.unauthorizedBody: This account is not a platform administrator. The backend rejects every platform request from this user — sign in with a platform_admin account.
admin.rbac.gate.configBody: This section talks to the platform API and needs the following build-time environment variables:
admin.rbac.gate.apiUrlWarning: VITE_API_URL is not set — requests go to the current origin.
admin.rbac.gate.profileError: Could not load your platform profile.
admin.rbac.common.name: Name (key)
admin.rbac.orgs.title: Organizations
admin.rbac.orgs.subtitle: Search organizations and manage their module assignments.
admin.rbac.orgs.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, or subdomain...
admin.rbac.orgDetail.title: Module assignment
admin.rbac.orgDetail.subtitle: Assign platform modules and override submodules for this organization
admin.rbac.orgDetail.legend: Effective availability = module active in catalog AND assigned AND enabled AND submodule not overridden off. No submodule row means it inherits enabled.
admin.rbac.orgDetail.unassignWarning: Not assigned — assigning enables it; unassigning a module also removes its submodule overrides.
admin.rbac.catalog.title: Module catalog
admin.rbac.catalog.subtitle: Global modules and submodules available to organizations.
admin.rbac.catalog.confirmDeleteModule: Delete this module? The backend refuses (409) while roles or organizations still reference it — prefer deactivating.
admin.rbac.catalog.confirmDeleteSubmodul: Delete this submodule? The backend refuses (409) while roles or overrides still reference it.
admin.rbac.catalog.editInMatrix: Edit availability in the action matrix
admin.rbac.actions.title: Actions
admin.rbac.actions.subtitle: Global action catalog (create, read, update, delete, export...).
admin.rbac.actions.confirmDelete: Delete this action? The backend refuses (409) while role permissions or the availability matrix still reference it.
admin.rbac.matrix.title: Action matrix
admin.rbac.matrix.subtitle: Which actions are grantable per submodule.
admin.rbac.matrix.note: A checked cell makes the action grantable on that submodule for organization roles. Unchecking does not delete existing grants — they simply stop resolving.
